title: DeclaredResource
description: A single infrastructure resource as declared in an OpenTofu / Terraform state file

resource_type.description: Terraform resource type, e.g. proxmox_vm_qemu, proxmox_lxc, null_resource

resource_name.description: Terraform resource name (the label in the HCL block)

module.description: Module path, e.g. module.vms, or null for root module

instance_index.description: count index or for_each key; null for single instances

attributes.description: Normalized subset of resource attributes relevant to infrastructure observation

name.description: Human-readable name (vm name, container hostname, etc.)

target_node.description: Proxmox node this resource is declared to run on

disk_size.description: Primary disk size as declared, e.g. '32G'

taint.description: True if the resource is marked for recreation
